---
title: "The Team"
format: html
toc: false
---

## Meet the Team

<p style="max-width: 800px;">
This project was developed by postgraduate students from the 
<strong>Master of IT in Business (MITB)</strong> programme at 
<strong>Singapore Management University (SMU)</strong>, specialising in the 
<strong>Data Science and Analytics track</strong>.
</p>

<div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">

<!-- Gautam -->
<div style="flex: 1 1 300px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;">

### Gautamgovan Elangovan  
📧 gautamgovan@gmail.com  
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/govanzz)

**Role:** Predictive Modelling & System Integration  

Developed machine learning models for customer behaviour prediction and handled integration of project components into the deployed website.

</div>

<!-- Meng Ye -->
<div style="flex: 1 1 300px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;">

### Ng Meng Ye  
📧 mengye1996@outlook.com  
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/ngmengye)

**Role:** Exploratory Data Analysis & Shiny Dashboard  

Led exploratory and statistical analysis and developed the interactive dashboard for visualization and user-driven analysis.

</div>

<!-- Chandru -->
<div style="flex: 1 1 300px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;">

### Chandru Kolanchiyappan  
📧 kchandru2000@gmail.com  
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/chandrugtx8)

**Role:** Customer Segmentation (Clustering)  

Developed clustering models to identify customer segments and contributed to integrating analytical insights into the application.

</div>

</div>
